prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: The Neighbor Who Babysat Too Much
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Divorce Gothic
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: A town never forgets. It just redecorates.
Omen: a Christmas ornament turning up wet
Relationship dynamic: emotionally charged casserole exchange
Props: ceramic owl, snow globe, scarf with impossible timing

Cast:
- Daniel Marlowe | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=magazine editor | threat_aura=0.43 | space=annex room described as old family things | secrets=once left town without explaining why; has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Cole Cross | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=high school coach | threat_aura=0.39 | space=retreat cabin with candles, blankets, and difficult silence | secrets=ignored a warning text on the worst possible night; still has access to a property he does not own
- Wyatt Pruitt | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=salon owner | threat_aura=0.46 | space=marina tackle room described as paperwork I have not gone through yet | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence

- Mara Vale | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=local podcaster | threat_aura=0.27 | space=dock office with a desk nobody fully claims | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts; saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it
- Rachel Vale | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Luke Winterson | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Cole Cross is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Daniel Marlowe says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Winter Hollow.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Cole?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Rachel. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Daniel. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The ceramic owl is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Claire."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
